receipts.title: River
receipts.excerpt: River is the fictional demo relationship note. The note exists to test intimate export filtering and relationship graph semantics.

receipts.title: Lumen Sketch
receipts.excerpt: Lumen Sketch is a fictional creative tool about turning mood boards into small visual posters. The proof moment is one export that feels worth saving without apologizing for it. Source: [[90 Sources/Captures/2026-05-2...

receipts.title: Taste Profile
receipts.excerpt: Mira likes warm interfaces with visible craft, specific motion, and emotional texture. Mira rejects generic dashboard polish when it has no real point of view.

receipts.title: Music Identity
receipts.excerpt: Mira keeps returning to warm, slow, dramatic, replayable music while shaping visual tools. The music reference is not decoration; it describes pacing, emotional temperature, and motion feel.

receipts.title: Life Timeline
receipts.excerpt: In April 2026, Mira started [[30 Work/Projects/Lumen Sketch]] after a week of messy visual experiments. In 2026, Ari helped Mira see that the project needed one strong export instead of ten half-finished directions.

receipts.title: Public Milestones
receipts.excerpt: In April 2026, Mira started [[30 Work/Projects/Lumen Sketch]] after a week of messy visual experiments. In May 2026, the first useful export made the project feel like a real creative tool instead of a folder of almosts.

outcome_signals: The proof moment is one export that feels worth saving without apologizing for it. Source: [[90 Sources/Captures/2026-05-21-demo-answer]].
Taste guardrail: warm, specific, useful, emotional, and never generic dashboard sludge.
Mira rejects generic dashboard polish when it has no real point of view.
The Lumen Sketch export should feel tactile, emotional, useful, and not embarrassed by being pretty.
Feature lists that do not change the user’s feeling or artifact.
Visual polish with no proof moment underneath it.
In 2026, Ari helped Mira see that the project needed one strong export instead of ten half-finished directions.
In May 2026, the pressure around the first export became a useful craft signal instead of only stress.
calibration_questions: What happened after the choice, in concrete artifact or relationship terms?
What did the original decision brief overvalue or miss?
What should Self Atlas remember for the next similar decision?
